name: CoreCoder
desc: Minimal AI coding agent (~1,400 LoC Python) inspired by Claude Code. Works with any LLM. Think NanoGPT for coding agents. Formerly NanoCoder.
descFull: Minimal AI coding agent (~1,400 LoC Python) inspired by Claude Code. Works with any LLM. Think NanoGPT for coding agents. Formerly NanoCoder.
